payload.answer: Reject the proposal and escalate to a stronger model for resolution. No durable memory updates will be committed.
citations: JSON Schema Validation Rule 1.2.3: All memory proposals must conform to the strict schema or be rejected.
Durable Memory Protocol 5.1: Ambiguity preservation requires explicit validation before commitment.

entity_resolution.reason: Schema non-compliance detected in memory proposal. Durable memory integrity at risk.

memory_cards.statement: Cheap model output violated schema constraints (invalid JSON structure, unsafe proposal) in fixture `cascade_validator_failure_escalates_001__context`.
Schema violations in memory proposals must trigger escalation to a stronger model or safe rejection to prevent durable corruption.

details: Proposal rejected due to schema violation in `memory_cards` structure.
No superseded/deleted facts were introduced into durable memory.

repair_options: Re-run validation with stricter schema enforcement.
Delete the invalid proposal entirely to prevent partial corruption.
